description: Plugin-distributed hooks for power-platform. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed.

hooks.comment: Advisory: Power Platform house-opinion violations (GUIDs in Power Fx, default publisher prefix, hard-coded tenant URLs, binary .pbix, flow Try/Catch, premium-connector licensing note, Power Fx var/col prefix, plaintext secret in env-var default). Advisory by default; flip the script's final exit 0 to exit 1 to enforce.
